description: Canonical portfolio root nodes. These four portfolios are the anchor points for orphan detection: any graph node that cannot be traced to one of these portfolio roots via a qualifying path is flagged is_orphan: true by the Sprint 2 orphan detector.

portfolios.name: Foundational
portfolios.description: IT infrastructure, platform services, and architectural building blocks that underpin all value streams. Includes compute, network, data platforms, and security capabilities.

portfolios.name: Manufacturing and Delivery
portfolios.description: Products and capabilities that support the internal manufacture and delivery pipeline: CI/CD, build tooling, release orchestration, and deployment automation.

portfolios.name: For Employees
portfolios.description: Digital products and services consumed internally by employees: productivity tools, ITSM, HR systems, and internal portals.

portfolios.name: Products and Services Sold
portfolios.description: Revenue-generating digital products and service offers delivered to external consumers. Includes all commercially contracted service offers.
portfolios.it4it_reference: IT4IT §6.4 Products and Services Sold Portfolio
